name: Carrot 'n' Raisin Cheescake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, granulated sugar, ground nutmeg, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325 degrees F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add granulated sugar and flour, mixing until well blended. Beat in eggs and orange juice. Stir in carrots, raisins, and remaining spices. Mix thoroughly.
3. Pour filling over crust. Bake at 450 degrees F for an additional 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F and continue baking for 55 more minutes.
4. Remove from oven and let cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill completely.
5. In a bowl, combine remaining cream cheese with orange juice until smooth. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing until well blended. Spread over the top of the cheesecake. Garnish with additional raisins and finely shredded carrots, if desired.
